MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VICTOR SERRATO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED. Punitive damages are not available for breach of implied contractual covenant. Spinks v. Equity Residential (2009) 171 Cal.App.4th. To the extent Plaintiff is asserting a trespass cause of action (Opposition 3:15-28), Plaintiff has a leave to amend to so allege. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
